import json,re
p='articles/2026/01/08/articles.jsonl'
patterns=[
 ('grok', r'Grok|xAI|sexualised|sexualized|deepfake|chatbot|MeitY|spicy mode'),
 ('afcon_sabalenka', r'AFCON|Africa Cup of Nations|Morocco|Nigeria|Algeria|Cameroon|Sabalenka|Brisbane International|Rybakina|Pegula|Gauff'),
 ('yemen', r'Yemen|al-Alimi|National Shield|Homeland Shield|Southern Transitional|STC|Hadramout|al-Mahra|Zubaidi'),
 ('iran', r'Iran|Ilam|Lorestan|Kermanshah|Qom|Hamedan|Malekshahi|protests|police|security personnel'),
 ('thai_poll', r'National Institute of Development Administration|NIDA|Bhumjaithai|People.s Party|Pheu Thai|Anutin Charnvirakul|Natthaphong|Sihasak'),
 ('syria_sdf', r'SDF|Syrian Democratic Forces|Maskana|Deir Hafer|eastern Aleppo|Kurdish-led|Kobani|Hasakah|Qamishli|al-Shaddadi'),
 ('somalia', r'Somalia|Somaliland|Gideon Saar|separatist|agreements'),
 ('manutd', r'Manchester United|Man Utd|Ole Gunnar Solskjaer|Michael Carrick|Darren Fletcher|Ruben Amorim|Ruud van Nistelrooy'),
 ('brics_dhs', r'BRICS.*naval|naval drills|Ramaphosa|South Africa.*drills|Department of Homeland Security|DHS funding|spending package|Senate Democrats'),
 ('nipah', r'Nipah'),
 ('trade_deficit', r'goods trade deficit|trade deficit.*double|annual trade report|Switzerland|Vietnam|Taiwan|Ireland'),
]
for label,pat in patterns:
    rx=re.compile(pat,re.I|re.S)
    print('\n##',label)
    total=0; shown=0
    for i,line in enumerate(open(p),1):
        try: a=json.loads(line)
        except: continue
        text=' '.join(str(a.get(k) or '') for k in ['title','description','content'])
        if rx.search(text):
            total+=1
            if shown<18:
                print(i,a.get('date_publish'),a.get('source'),'::',a.get('title'))
                shown+=1
    print('total',total)
PY

Unacceptable images: Sweden
